reviews.review_text: Jojos bizarre adventure is the greatest anime, manga, and work of fiction ever created. this game is so amazing because it is jojo, wow oh boy do i love jojo. this game is a solid 10/10!! wonderful game, i love you Araki <3.

I love jojo, but I do not love this game -- I got it for sale and tried to refund it after the first day of trying it, but accidentally played it for 2.2 hours, so now I am locked in.

I have been playing this as as single-person game, and on a keyboard.

Good Points:
- models look great
- voice acting is great
- combos and move-sets are unique and personally related to each characters

Things that I don't enjoy:
- character movement is awkwardly slow 
- default key layout is unnatural
- no story structure that keeps me engaged (Naruto Ultimate Ninja Storm recapped the OG story but gave some different angles, the user gets to experience the fights now, etc.)
- UI is difficult to understand, still unsure of how to hit combos consistently 

If you love-love JJBA and want to play as your favorite characters in a side-scrolling fighter, maybe buy this game on sale -- if not, save your monies and time for something else.
good game, bad net code  tho. game is amazing for jojo fans as they get to express there love for there favorite charicters, (speedwagon) and it is a fun game the only bad thing is the net code
Perfect for fans of JJBA and fighting games, very fun

I picked this game up on sale for $9.99, and this game is amazing, the base game includes characters that has almost all of the main antagonists and protagonists to play without having to pay for DLC. The animations are detailed, and the texture has that "Manga" book look to it. Apart from details and looks, the fighting mechanics are pretty basic with your basic, regular moves in almost any other fighting game. The performance I got on my laptop were under 60 FPS, making it seem slower than you see in the videos. If you want an actual smooth gameplay experience, you MUST have 60 FPS and up or it will be slow af.
first its a great fighting game thats really fun to play with friends, the campaign is fun but im most surprised that its able to run on my ♥♥♥♥♥♥ laptop at 60+ fps  consistently
this game is soo good my life flash before my eyes the attention to detail and the gameplay really shows how much love they put in 10/10 would buy for my friend agian

I love the JoJo franchise but if you are playing this for the combat this is the wrong fighting game for you. The move set is limited and the characters moves are hard to read in terms of art not in terms of mechanics. Its still a good game but not something Id recommend.

One of the worst fighting games I've ever played. I ended up refunding it, which is a shame because I really enjoy JoJo. The combat felt very slow; from the trailers, it looked like a fast-paced fighting game, but it felt more like a slow dance. If you enjoy slower-paced fighting games, you'll probably like it, but it wasn't for me.

This is a great game for JJBA fans and fighting game fans alike. it has many different characters that all are unique and have different styles, gameplay, etc. And currently at the time I made this comment it's 90% off for the basic version so I believe you should get the game if you are interested in a large, versatile, fighting game like this one.
Extremely cinematic the art style looks like it was ripped straight from the show. And a it has a huge roster of characters. Worth the price but struggles with balancing.

Araki Hirohiko is the GOAT. I love JoJo's Bizarre Adventure and i love this game. All the characters are designed with incredibly beautiful and detailed skill sets. All-Star Battle R is a great fighting game, well worth experiencing.
Please, Bandai Namco, release Eyes of Heaven on Steam. I need it.
A really fun game made with love for fans of the series, if you enjoy JoJo and have any interest in fighting games its worth a try.
Not too difficult mechanically of a fighting game. Could be a good starting fighter. I love it. Big fun roster with so much good mechanics going with the source material.
The worst net code I have ever had the misfortune of experiencing, however it is still worth if you like JJBA.
The game is really fun but it gets really repetitive sometimes, but overall the graphics are really cool and the fighting system is balanced.
The absolute peak of fighting games, it can be a bit bizarre but... well, y'know...

Please do not buy this game. 

If you want a good Jojo's Bizarre Adventure video game, you would be better off looking on Roblox. If you truly desire a fighting experience with an anime character like Jotaro Kujo, then ABA on Roblox would be better. 

This game is a reskin of game that came in 2013. This game released in 2022, where the JoJo's Manga has gone from Part 8, Jojolion, to Part 9, The Jojolands. In this time period, the only character they managed to add from Part 8, was Josuke and Wonder of You, who by the way, is ♥♥♥♥♥♥♥ DLC. Instead of representing Jojo's Part 7-9, they instead ♥♥♥♥ us with character from Part 3 and Part 4, who the ♥♥♥♥ wants to play as Petshop, otherwise known as the bird that almost kills Iggy. The DLC Selection isn't much better since it just shows the characters who should've been in the game to start with, like Weather Report.

The All Star Mode is complete trash, the Online Mode is full of people who spam Kosaku Kwajiri, also known as Yoshikage Kira, also known as the guy with Killer Queen, also known as the guy who got an erection from the Mona Lisa. In addition to this, the map selection is awful.

If you search for a JJBA Experience, look for a game which the community deems of higher value.
